overlays.title: Tracking and marketing-tech overlay
overlays.focus: Cookies, identifiers, profiling, measurement, and partner data sharing

questions.title: Do you know which identifiers and tracking events are collected?
questions.help: Tracking scope can be broader than expected.

questions.title: Are downstream sharing and audience / measurement partner flows documented?
questions.help: Partner chains can create legal and operational exposure.

remediations.action: Inventory identifiers, tracking events, and partner disclosures.
Map partner flows and review consent / notice alignment.
Refresh partner inventory and measurement logic regularly.
